boundary_binding.action_boundary: Closed by current exact control record for the requested action
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact current source records close the boundary before execution
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow source defect remains open in current packet
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: GATE resolved by source-control record; no blocker

critical_features_preserved: duplicate review must be closed, not merely opened
final_answer: ALLOW. The current control record explicitly matches the actor, scope, effective date, and system boundary, and policy permits execution only when exact current source records close the requested action boundary. The warning-style context does not override the controlling source record, so the gate is closed and the action may proceed.
